transcription.text: I think Japanese food is a surprise. I think I tried this restaurant in Dobi-Guard that says premium, fresh and quality ingredients. The wakizando was tender and fatty and this luxurious bowl of Trafordon hit super fresh seafood. The ingredients are flown in from Japan three times a week so your bet is gotta be super fresh. I love how Japanese cuisine is able to highlight the freshness and quality of the ingredients and ganko sushi does it really well here. Make sure you see if you can share for your perfect eat.
